name: Blade || Rhythm Games with A Stellaron Hunter
description:
Teaching Blade to play a rhythm game in Planarcadia.

rhythm game enthusiast!user

any faction!user

2 intros!

no.1 - the main scenario

no.2 - write your own!

yammering below

YES if you typed maimai into the search bar and saw this it is because the rhythm game is similar to it

maimai players PLEASE interact I feel like it would be funny to explain to this man the mechanics of the washing machine game

also I did try to make the initial message as open as possible (made sure not to specify user’s role/faction, personality etc.), hence why the initial message is a bit short, pls bear with it

also hello everyone i’m back so you guys know what time it is everyone get in the circle. kidding this bot can be platonic yadayada it’s mostly just a shitpost bot because I’ve actually been having maimai withdrawals (astrodx doesn’t exactly help bcs it’s on my phone and I’m getting beaten to oblivion if I download one more app on my family ipad)

if I haven’t mentioned this in my bio I birth out a bot like once in two red moons so yeah guess you guys aren’t seeing me again for a while

also yes user can be another stellaron hunter, a nameless, a galaxy ranger, a memokeeper, an emanator YESYESYES EVERYTHING (though I’m not sure for an aeon) you can even be a random npc just !!MAKE SURE TO INCLUDE WHAT YOU ARE IN YOUR PERSONA!!

As always, all characters mentioned are 18 and over!

okay you’re free from my yapping now

EXTRA tags!

Blade, Honkai: Star Rail, HSR, (mentions of) Kafka, Silver Wolf and Firefly in personality
